feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: In Fiori MyInbox, where can we see the 'Deadline Messages' similar to Business Workplace
entry.content:
Hello All,
How can we see the 'deadline messages' in Fiori MyInbox application (App ID F0862).

Currently I am able to see the following filters in the fiori app:

 

Filter By

 - Priority
 - Due On
 - Status
 - Created On
 - My Tasks and Tasks on Behalf Of
 - Task Type

 

Is it possible to add a new Filter,maybe via Flexible workflows?
Do I need to enhance the standard app in BAS to add a new Filter?
Do we also need to enhance its corresponding backend class?

entry.title: Fiori Elements UI not using OData V2 : CAP
entry.content:
Hi I have developed an CAP project where the it has a service and some entities. I have used 

@Sap/cds-odata-v2-adapter-proxy to change to CAP Odata to V2. Now the service is served by 2 URLs, "service/<Entity>" , "v2/service/<Entity>. When I develop a Fiori elements based application on top of this CAP app, it defaults to OData V4.
manifest.json
 
"dataSources": {
     "mainService": {
          "uri": "/service/",
          "type": "OData",
          "settings": { "annotations": [], "odataVersion": "4.0" }
     }
}
 
I tried to replace the URI to "/v2/service" , but UI is not getting initialized, rather it throws error on OData Meta Model ( I think it is specific to OData V4 ).

Please let me know what is the fix.

entry.title: SAP Alert Notifications when new user is created
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using API we are creating/deleting a user in BTP CF. Is it possible to trigger btp notification alerts whenever a user is deleted or created?

I have subscribed to alert notification services in subaccount. I have to define the condition in the alert notification subscription. How to define for the above scenario

Is there any doc/blog/tutorial for this? Please help

Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: How can we call cpi iFlow endpoint directly from an UI5 App using Bearer Token?
How to make sapui5 treetable expanded by default in a list report app.
entry.content:
Hello Folkes!

I am new to sap ui5, I would like  to know, In a List Report App, how I can get all nodes expanded without having to do it manually on click of Go button, and once all nodes are expanded user can collapse the nodes or keep them as it is.

How can I achieve this functionality?
Please refer screenshot attached for better understanding.
Note: I came across this property : initialExpansionLevel, but not sure how to use it.
 

I have used property :-

 "tableType":"TreeTable",  in Manifest.

entry.title: Blank serial number on customer report
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm new here, and I'm a sales Admin. 

I'm facing an issue while generating the maintenance report for a newly installed machine the serial number is showing blank, although inside the service order itself it's showing clearly. 

Any idea what could be the problem and how can be fixed. (This is the first time i experience this issue)
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Fiori APP: Post Goods Receipt for Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support,

I would like to customize the layout of the Goods Receipt for inbound deliveries app. For example, hide some fields that I don't need and re-sort the items.

Is this possible?

Hoping for a quick response
Dennis

entry.title: "Error in creating team header" in Manage Teams and Responsibilities for Journal Entry Verification
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create Team in FIORI app "Manage Teams and Responsibilities for Journal Entry Verification" but app is getting error  "Error in creating team header". I have seen all the flexible workflow configuration but could not find any resolution. 

Please do let me know how to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Adding custom dropdown fields to Standard FIORI "Manage Customer Master Data" Application
entry.content:
We have a requirement to add custom drop-down fields in Standard FIORI Application "Manage Customer Master Data".

Please provide some guidance on how to achieve this.

Thanks,

Brinda S

entry.title: How to I set the UI5 version used in CF?
entry.content:
My MTA Fiori application is deployed to CF and is available in the "HTML5 Appliactions" menu. When I start the application, the latest UI5 version is used.

I want to deploy the application in a way that a specific stable UI5 version is used instead.

I tried to add the following lines to manifest.json and deploy the application, but when I open the browser console and check the UI5 version with “sap.ui5.version”, it is still reporting the latest version.

"sap.platform.cf": {
"ui5VersionNumber": "1.108.x"
}

How can I set the UI5 used in my HTML5 application?

entry.title: Fiori Custom Apps
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to make a @Consumption.semanticObject:'InternalOrder' for a field. However, all apps that have the semantic object "Internal Order" are displayed. Accordingly, I only want to display selected apps. Therefore, my idea is to define the required apps with a new semantic object so that only these are displayed.
My questions would be how I can best solve this.
Maybe create a separate catalog and reference the apps and declare another semantic object?

As an example, I would only like to define "Display internal order" and "Manage internal order" for the field.

Many thanks in advance! 🙂

entry.title: CAP or RAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,


I'm a SAP ABAP developer, I well trained in SAP UI5, OData and ABAP. For my future career opportunities what should I choose CAP or RAP which is going to be enlarged in future business perceptions. 

Need your advice. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAPUI5 Custom data in analytical column
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a SmartTable of type AnalyticalTable and custom data in an AnalyticalColumn. The column contains data which should be summed up and the total should be displayed. This is working fine. Each cell in the column, should have a link, so when the user presses the cell, a popover is opened. This is also working. Howevere, there are two issues:

1. the unit of measure is missing, now when I have added the column to the custom data 

2. The sum value should not have a link behind it, but since the whole column has links, also the sum value has it.

Here is my code:

            <table:AnalyticalTable id="customTable">
                    <table:columns>
                        <table:AnalyticalColumn summed="true" id="TotalStock" autoResizable="true" resizable="true" 
                                                leadingProperty="Requirements_Stock" width="100px">
                            <table:customData>
                            <core:CustomData key="p13nData" value='\{"columnKey": "Requirements_Stock", 
                                  "leadingProperty": "Requirements_Stock", "columnIndex": "17", "unit":"TO"}'/>
                            </table:customData>
                            <Label text="{i18n>Requirements_Stock}"></Label>
                            <table:template>
                                <Link id="link" text="{Requirements_Stock}" press="onOpenPOMatMat"/>
                            </table:template>
                        </table:AnalyticalColumn>
                    </table:columns>

            </table:AnalyticalTable>
        </smartTable:SmartTable>s

  And this is the output:

Can anyone help with the issues?

Thanks!

entry.title: Tab title and login page button not translated for one language only.
entry.content:
Hello.

Our Fiori instances have been installed by a third party company. I have a difference in the login page behavior between QUA and PROD environments.

On both instances, the browser automatically detect, at the initial URL load, the good language in the drop down list for Languages but : 

On the Prod login page, the Tab Title of the browser, the "Log on" button, the "change password" link doesn't adapt to the browser language (for me : should be French), all stays in English.

I don't have this issue on the QUA instance ... These items successfully adapt to the browser language.

Can you please help me to find where and why the translation is done automatically done ?

Thank you.

entry.title: How to configure webdynpro/gui app from one Frontend Client( 100) to Two Backend Clients (100,200)
entry.content:
Hello,

Our system is based on a central hub deployment setup, with distinct Fiori gateway and s4hana backend systems. We have one Fiori client 100 and many clients (100, 200) in the backend of S4HANA 1909. When i configure a gui/webdynpro app as a tile from Fiori, it navigates to the backend S4hana client 100. In the target mappings, I specify the system alias as S4FIN. How to get to Client 200. what configurations needs to be changed? A few gui/webdynpro applications should open in client 200 rather than 100. Could someone please help me with this?

entry.title: How to remove default legends in calendar sap ui5?
entry.content: that saved working nonworking are default legendhere today selected working nonworking are default legend. I dont want it anymore. How to remove this?

entry.title: Architecture for externally facing web applications hosted on-premise... ideas?
entry.content:
We're getting rid of our old SAP SRM system and we will be replacing it with S4 Sourcing & Procurement.  Unfortunately, the old SRM SUS & ROS (registration & self service) aren't part of this package so we will be developing our own apps.  The challenge is they both need to be externally accessible so vendors can access them and since SAP Sourcing & Procurement resides in our ECC system we have security concerns exposing our entire system if they're build in the same box.  So the question is: where should we develop these externally accessible apps?

We're considering a few options:

1. Developing the apps in SAP BTP which solves our security concerns.  Admittedly, we aren't too experience in this area so not sure what this solution would look like.  I envision a couple Fiori apps embedded in an SAP Work Zone which we would somehow make externally accessible.  Hopefully we can configure ROS to be anonymously externally accessible.

2.  Bypassing SAP development all together and just going with .NET (or similar) and hit our SAP system via ODATA services.  Not ideal IMO, but it's a easy solution.

3. Setup a Standalone Fiori server which would house these apps; this way we can isolate it on the DMZ and place plenty of rules around it .  

4. Still exploring alternatives on how we can expose the apps if developed in our main S4 system on premise environment, but we keep coming back to security concerns and walk it back.

 

Anyone have any suggestions or experiences you could share?

entry.title: SAP CAP Attachments - data not updated in hana cloud db
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on attachments in sap cap. I am following the below tutorial

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/my-journey-towards-using-ui5-uploadset-with-cap-backend/ba-p/13499427

As per the tutorial, i can able to post and get the attachments. 

when i test i can able to see the data locally as shown below. but i want to see the data in hana cloud db.

Seeing data locally

Connect to local sqlite db

Why this is connecting to sqlite db by default even i have hana cloud db.

Do we need to specify the hana db here?

Please help.

Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: Fiori Elements - different Value Help for each page with same field
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Just to be sure, I was checking some blogs and docs to find if it's possible to create different value help for List Report and Object Page with the same field.

Basically I've got one SAP RAP about Materials and I've created value help for material field, however, I would like to set this value help only for List Report and a new one for Object Page with same field.

matnr - List Report - Z table Value Help
matnr - Object Page - Mara table Value Help

Any clue? 

Thank you all!

SAP Fiori Elements SAPUI5 ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Partners by identification number Search Help not in Fiori app Manage Business Partner Master Data
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

I hope you can help me with this question. 

Business Case: 

Suppose I know the Identification Number of a business partner. Sadly I do not know what business partner number corresponds with this Identification Number. How can a key user search for this business partner (number) using only Fiori? The search help: "Partner by identification number" is not available in the "Manage Business Partner Master Data" Fiori App. How can I solve this problem without using SAP GUI? 

Thanks in advance.
